samples.target_compile_errors:
error: this trait cannot be derived for unions
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gemma-3-12b/expressions/struct_and_union_3a/sample_001/target.rs:1:10
  |
1 | #[derive(Debug)]
  |          ^^^^^

error[E0740]: field must implement `Copy` or be wrapped in `ManuallyDrop<...>` to be used in a union
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gemma-3-12b/expressions/struct_and_union_3a/sample_001/target.rs:3:5
  |
3 |     n: NestedStruct,
  |     ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  |
  = note: union fields must not have drop side-effects, which is currently enforced via either `Copy` or `ManuallyDrop<...>`
help: wrap the field type in `ManuallyDrop<...>`
  |
3 |     n: std::mem::ManuallyDrop<NestedStruct>,
  |        +++++++++++++++++++++++            +

error[E0784]: union expressions should have exactly one field
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gemma-3-12b/expressions/struct_and_union_3a/sample_001/target.rs:26:17
   |
26 |     let mut u = U { n: NestedStruct { alltypes: 0 }, ni: NestedStruct2 { type_: 0, intnode: 0 }, nf: NestedStruct3 { type_: 0, doublenode: 0....
   |                 ^

error[E0308]: mismatched types
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gemma-3-12b/expressions/struct_and_union_3a/sample_001/target.rs:32:16
